basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology
basic_details.short_information: The Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 position. Candidates up to 28 years of age and holding a M.Sc./Integrated BS-MS/M.Sc./B.Tech in Physics or equivalent degree with 55% marks and having qualified NET-LS/GATE are eligible to apply via email at the official website https://www.svnit.ac.in. The application process will be active until 15 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 Years Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes/Tribes/OBC, women, and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. /Integrated BS-MS/M.Sc./B. Tech in Physics or equivalent degree with 55% marks and passing of NET-LS/GATE test.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc. /Integrated BS-MS/M.Sc./B. Tech in Physics or equivalent degree with 55% marks and passing of NET-LS/GATE test.

salary_details.details: Rs.37,000/-p.m + HRA as per norms. (Rs. 37000/- p.m in First & Second years)

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be intimated by email for a personal interview. Selection will be based on performance in interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT JRF position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at SVNIT is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. /Integrated BS-MS/M.Sc./B. Tech in Physics or an equivalent degree with at least 55% marks and have passed the NET-LS/GATE test.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA as per norms, for the first and second years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the JRF application?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for the JRF position is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and then invited for a personal interview. The final selection will be based on the performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit a CV, scanned copies of your NET/GATE qualified certificate, and scanned copies of your PG marksheet and degree certificate.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely via email. You need to send your complete application and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project duration or job type?
faq.answer: This is a project-based research position, implying it is for a specific duration tied to the research project.

faq.question: Q9. Does SVNIT offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation of up to 5 years is offered to candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes/Tribes/OBC, women, and physically handicapped individuals.

faq.question: Q10. What is the email address for submitting the application?
faq.answer: The application should be emailed to Dr. Dipika Patel at [email protected] with the subject line “Application for JRF under CSIR project”.
